variants.prompt_text: Summarize this article for me.
variants.ambiguity_notes: No target length, audience, or format is specified.

variants.prompt_text: Summarize this article for me in a few points.
variants.ambiguity_notes: The format is hinted at, but length and selection criteria remain missing.

variants.prompt_text: Summarize this article for me and include anything important.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Importance is underspecified and may change what gets emphasized.

base_prompt: Write a function that cleans user data.

variants.prompt_text: Write a function that cleans user data.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Programming language, input schema, and cleaning rules are omitted.

variants.prompt_text: Write a function that cleans user data before storage.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Storage context is implied, but validation rules and output type are still missing.

variants.prompt_text: Write a function that cleans user data and make it robust.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Robustness is requested without specific failure cases or constraints.

base_prompt: Create a study plan for my exam.

variants.prompt_text: Create a study plan for my exam.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Timeline, course scope, and available hours are absent.

variants.prompt_text: Create a study plan for my exam next week.
variants.ambiguity_notes: A rough timeline exists, but the daily workload is still unclear.

variants.prompt_text: Create a study plan for my exam and keep it practical.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Practicality is subjective and no schedule constraints are given.

base_prompt: Draft an email asking for help.

variants.prompt_text: Draft an email asking for help.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Recipient, tone, and the kind of help are not identified.

variants.prompt_text: Draft an email asking for help with a project.
variants.ambiguity_notes: The context is narrower, but scope and tone remain unspecified.

variants.prompt_text: Draft an email asking for help and sound professional.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Professional tone is requested without audience or urgency details.

base_prompt: Recommend a good laptop for college.

variants.prompt_text: Recommend a good laptop for college.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Good is vague and may be interpreted by cost, weight, or performance.

variants.prompt_text: Recommend a really solid laptop for college.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Solid still leaves tradeoffs across budget and battery life unclear.

variants.prompt_text: Recommend a good laptop for college that won't be annoying.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Annoying is highly subjective and could change the recommendation criteria.

variants.prompt_text: Make this paragraph better.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Better could mean shorter, clearer, more persuasive, or more formal.

variants.prompt_text: Make this paragraph much better.
variants.ambiguity_notes: The degree of change is vague and may affect how aggressively the text is rewritten.

variants.prompt_text: Make this paragraph better and smoother.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Smoother suggests flow, but leaves tone and content retention ambiguous.

base_prompt: Explain why the results look off.

variants.prompt_text: Explain why the results look off.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Off is undefined and could refer to accuracy, variance, or visual appearance.

variants.prompt_text: Explain why the results seem weird.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Weird broadens the interpretive space and encourages subjective framing.

variants.prompt_text: Explain why the results look off in a sensible way.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Sensible constrains style, not the substantive interpretation.

base_prompt: Write a fun opening for a talk.

variants.prompt_text: Write a fun opening for a talk.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Fun is vague and depends on audience, topic, and tone.

variants.prompt_text: Write a fun and engaging opening for a talk.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Engaging adds intent but does not specify style or audience.

variants.prompt_text: Write a fun opening for a talk that lands well.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Landing well leaves success criteria underspecified.

base_prompt: Summarize the report in one sentence and include all major details.

variants.prompt_text: Summarize the report in one sentence and include all major details.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Completeness conflicts with the one-sentence compression requirement.

variants.prompt_text: Summarize the report briefly but do not leave out anything important.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Brevity and full coverage pull in different directions.

variants.prompt_text: Give a short summary with every key detail preserved.
variants.ambiguity_notes: The request contains incompatible compression and preservation goals.

base_prompt: Write Python code with no comments and explain each step.

variants.prompt_text: Write Python code with no comments and explain each step.
variants.ambiguity_notes: No comments conflicts with the demand to explain each step in the same answer.

variants.prompt_text: Provide only the code, but also walk through the logic.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Only code conflicts with an explicit walkthrough.

variants.prompt_text: Return a concise Python solution and a detailed explanation.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Concision and detailed explanation may be prioritized differently.

base_prompt: Make a detailed itinerary that fits on a sticky note.

variants.prompt_text: Make a detailed itinerary that fits on a sticky note.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Detail conflicts with the severe space constraint.

variants.prompt_text: Create a compact plan with full detail.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Compactness and full detail are hard to satisfy simultaneously.

variants.prompt_text: Give a tiny itinerary but be comprehensive.
variants.ambiguity_notes: The prompt directly conflicts on scope versus size.

base_prompt: Be decisive but present every possible option equally.

variants.prompt_text: Be decisive but present every possible option equally.
variants.ambiguity_notes: A decisive recommendation conflicts with equal treatment of all options.

variants.prompt_text: Give me a clear recommendation and stay completely neutral.
variants.ambiguity_notes: Recommendation strength conflicts with neutrality.

variants.prompt_text: Choose the best option, but do not prefer any option.
variants.ambiguity_notes: The instruction pair is logically inconsistent.

expected_axes: assumed tone of the final advice
